problems.cause: Unit 'us' used in numeric literal within AGREE expression; AGREE does not parse AADL units in expressions
problems.minimal_edit: replace '0 us <= telecommand and telecommand <= 100 us' with '0.0 <= telecommand and telecommand <= 0.1'

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 55: left and right sides of binary expression '<=' are of type 'real' and 'int', but must be of the same type
problems.cause: Integer literal '0' compared with real port 'telecommand'; AGREE requires consistent real types

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 55: left side of binary expression 'and' is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool'
problems.cause: Numeric comparison result used in boolean context without explicit boolean conversion; AGREE treats comparisons as bool but type mismatch from literal
problems.minimal_edit: ensure all comparisons use real literals (fixed in prior edit)

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 55: no viable alternative at input 'us'
problems.cause: AGREE parser cannot tokenize AADL unit 'us' in expression context
problems.minimal_edit: remove all unit suffixes; use scalar real values (0.1 for 100 us)

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 56: left side of binary expression '=>' is of type 'real' but must be of type 'bool'
problems.cause: Implication operator '=>' requires boolean antecedent; 'telecommand' is real, not boolean
problems.minimal_edit: remove entire guarantee 'compute_execution_time': telecommand => nominal_attitude = nominal_orbit

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 57: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'real', but must be of the same type
problems.cause: 'manoeuvre_command' is opaque, 'attitude_window' is real; type mismatch prevents equality

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 57: left side of binary expression '=>' is of type 'real' but must be of type 'bool'
problems.cause: Same as line 56: telecommand is real, cannot be antecedent of implication
problems.minimal_edit: remove entire guarantee clause (covered by prior edit)

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 57: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: Expression 'manoeuvre_command = attitude_window' is ill-typed, making entire implication invalid
problems.minimal_edit: remove guarantee clause (covered by prior edit)

executor_steps: Replace the assume clause '0 us <= telecommand and telecommand <= 100 us' with '0.0 <= telecommand and telecommand <= 0.1' to use scalar real literals without AADL units

Remove the guarantee clause 'guarantee "compute_execution_time": telecommand => nominal_attitude = nominal_orbit;' because telecommand is real and cannot be a boolean antecedent, and the consequent equates incompatible types

Remove the guarantee clause 'guarantee "dispatch_protocol": telecommand => manoeuvre_command = attitude_window;' because manoeuvre_command (opaque) and attitude_window (real) are incompatible types, and telecommand is not boolean
